description: Style NoteWith this T-shirt from adidas with Climacool fabric, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be. With a superior performance fabric which keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsBlue polo T-shirt with short sleeves with buttoned tabs, is engineered with climacool technology, buttoned chest placket, buttoned pockets on the front, mesh panels at the back on the sides and embroidered branding at the back  Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
